hero.title: Olugendo lwo lukulindiridde mu Luulu lwa Afrika
hero.subtitle: Zuula safari ezitasangika, ebifo ebirungi n'obuwangwa obulamu ne Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.

story.label: Explore Africa with
story.title: Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.
story.description: Okuva ku nsozi ezirimu ekifu okutuuka ku migga eminene, manya Uganda mu ngeri empya.
story.p1: <0>Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.</0> is a destination management company established in Uganda, specializing in authentic, smooth, and memorable journeys across East Africa. From misty mountains and dense rainforests to serene lakes, mighty rivers, and warm local hospitality, we design travel experiences that feel personal, polished, and deeply connected to place.
story.p2: <0>Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.</0> offers carefully tailored safaris for families, couples, groups, and private explorers seeking something more meaningful than an ordinary holiday. Our journeys bring together wildlife, culture, conservation, and comfort, creating an elegant way to encounter Uganda in its most beautiful and unforgettable form.

why.label: Olugendo lwo. Obumanyirivu bwaffe.
why.title: Lwaki otambula ne Uganda Family Tours?
why.description: Tutegeka entambula ezitasangika ezirimu obuwangwa, obutonde n'ensolo za Uganda.
why.responsibleText: Okukuuma obutonde n'okuyamba abantu b'omu kitundu.

toursPage.title: Entambula zaffe
toursPage.description: Safari ezirondeddwa obulungi okukuleetera olugendo olutasangika mu Uganda ne East Africa.
toursPage.ctaTitle: Olugendo lwo lukulindiridde - tukutegekere ekirooto kyo

bookingForm.title: Bookinga olugendo luno
bookingForm.subtitle: Tubulire ku lugendo lwo tujja kukuddako ku budde n'ebbeeyi.
bookingForm.info: Tujja kukutuukirira ku email oba WhatsApp okukakasa.
bookingForm.success: Booking etumiddwa bulungi. Tujja kukutuukirira mangu.
bookingForm.requiredMissing: Jjuza ebifo ebyetaagisa ebiragiddwa nga tonnasindika.

inquiryForm.title: Buza ekibuuzo
inquiryForm.subtitle: Tubulire kye tuyinza okukuyamba, abakugu baffe bajja kukuddamu ku email oba WhatsApp.
inquiryForm.success: Obubaka butumiddwa bulungi. Tujja kukutuukirira mangu.

footer.about: Tuli kampuni y'amaka ey'awaka etegeka eco-safari mu Uganda ne East Africa.
footer.rights: © 2025 Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co. Obuyinza bwonna bukumiddwa.

welcome.label: Tukwaniriza
welcome.title: Karibu!
welcome.p1: Tukwaniriza mu Uganda Family Tours & Safari Company, omukwano gwo mu safari z'amaka ezirina obukuumi, essanyu era ezikuuma obutonde mu Luulu lwa Afrika.
welcome.p2: Tuli ttiimu y'abategesi b'entambula n'abakulembeze b'awaka abayamba amaka okulaba obulungi, ensolo n'obuwangwa bwa Uganda mu ngeri esanyusa abaana, ewummuza abazadde era ekuuma obutonde.

origins.label: Olugero lwaffe
origins.title: Entandikwa yaffe
origins.p1: Olugero lwaffe lwatandika n'okwagala obutonde, ensolo n'abantu ba Uganda. Ebyatandika nga safari entono ez'amaka byakula ne bifuuka omulimu ogw'okugabana obulungi bwa Afrika n'amaka okuva mu nsi yonna.
origins.p2: Mu myaka egiyise tuzimbye enkolagana ezesigika, tutegeka entambula ez'obukuumi era ezitasangika, ne tusigala ku mpisa zaffe: amazima, okukuuma obutonde n'okufaayo ennyo.

initiatives.label: Ebitutambuza
initiatives.title: Ebikolebwa byaffe
initiatives.description: Tukola okutambula okw'obuvunaanyizibwa era okugasa abantu b'omu kitundu, ensolo n'obutonde mu Uganda.

responsible.title: Obulambuzi obuvunaanyizibwa
responsible.text: Tukubiriza okutambula okukuuma obutonde, okuyamba abantu b'omu kitundu n'okukuuma obuwangwa.

community.title: Okuzzaamu abantu amaanyi
community.text: Tukolera wamu n'abantu b'omu kitundu okuyamba eby'enjigiriza, okutendeka n'emikisa gy'emirimu.

conservation.title: Okukuuma ensolo
conservation.text: Tuwagira enteekateeka ezikuuma ensolo n'ebifo mwe zibeera mu Uganda.

eco.title: Entambula ekuuma obutonde
eco.text: Tukendeeza ku bulabe eri obutonde nga tukola mu ngeri ey'omulembe era etegeerekeka.

mammadu.title: The Mammadu Trust in Windhoek
mammadu.p1: The Mammadu Trust yatandikibwawo okuyamba abaana abataliiko bazadde, abaana n'abakyala abali mu mbeera enzibu. Tukkiriza nti okutambula okw'obuvunaanyizibwa kulina okuleeta emikisa gy'amazima.
mammadu.p2: Bw'odda, omukulembeze wo ayinza okutegeka okulambula oba okuyunga ku bantu b'omu kitundu mu bwesigwa n'okufaayo.

orange.title: Orange Community Project
orange.p1: Tukolera wamu n'amasomero n'abantu b'omu kitundu okulongoosa ebibiina, okuwa ebikozesebwa n'okuyamba abaana okuyiga mu nkola.
orange.p2: Uganda Family Tours egenda mu maaso n'okuwagira pulojekiti z'abantu b'omu kitundu ezireeta emigaso egisigala oluvannyuma lwa safari.

gorilla-tracking-in-bwindi.title: Okulondoola engagi e Bwindi
gorilla-tracking-in-bwindi.shortDescription: Tambula mu kibira n'abakulembeze abakugu okulaba engagi z'ensozi mu kifo kyazo eky'obutonde.
gorilla-tracking-in-bwindi.overview: Yingira mu mutima gw'obulungi bw'obutonde. Bwindi erimu engagi z'ensozi nnyingi ezisigadde mu nsi. Olugendo luno olukwata enaku 4 lukuleetera ebiseera eby'ekibira, obuwangwa n'okukuuma ensolo.

murchison-falls-safari.title: Safari ya Murchison Falls
murchison-falls-safari.shortDescription: Laba amazzi agagwa n'amaanyi, game drive ezisanyusa n'olugendo lw'eryato ku Nile.
murchison-falls-safari.overview: Enteekateeka egatta ensolo ezimanyiddwa, obuwangwa, ebifo ebirungi n'okwaniriza okw'awaka.

queen-elizabeth-wildlife-safari.title: Safari y'ensolo Queen Elizabeth
queen-elizabeth-wildlife-safari.shortDescription: Lambula empologoma ezirinnya emiti, ennyanja za crater n'ebifo bya savanna n'omukulembeze w'awaka.
queen-elizabeth-wildlife-safari.overview: Safari erimu ensolo nnyingi, ebifo ebirungi n'okumanya abantu b'omu kitundu mu Uganda.

lake-bunyonyi-escape.title: Okuwummulira ku Lake Bunyonyi
lake-bunyonyi-escape.shortDescription: Wummulira ku nnyanja, enjoyinga ebizinga, canoe n'ebifo by'ensozi ebirungi.
lake-bunyonyi-escape.overview: Okuwummula okuteefu ku Lake Bunyonyi nga kulimu obutonde, obuwangwa n'ebifaananyi ebirungi.

chimpanzee-trekking.title: Okulondoola chimpanzee
chimpanzee-trekking.shortDescription: Londoola chimpanzee mu Kibale Forest era otambule mu Bigodi wetland.
chimpanzee-trekking.overview: Olugendo lw'ekibira okulaba primates, ebinyonyi n'obulungi bwa Kibale.

cultural-uganda-experience.title: Obuwangwa bwa Uganda
cultural-uganda-experience.shortDescription: Yingira mu mmere y'awaka, omuziki, ennyumya, obutale bw'emikono n'obulamu bw'abantu.
cultural-uganda-experience.overview: Olugendo lw'obuwangwa oluleeta ennono, emmere n'obulamu bw'abantu ba Uganda.

itineraryDays.title: Okutuuka n'okuteekebwa
itineraryDays.description: Otuuka ku kifo eky'okukwatirako oba ku airport, omukulembeze wa safari akwaniriza n'akunnyonnyola olugendo.

itineraryDays.title: Okulondoola engagi n'okugenda Queen Elizabeth
itineraryDays.description: Yingira mu kibira okulondoola engagi n'omukulembeze, oluvannyuma ogende Queen Elizabeth National Park.
itineraryDays.details: Okusula: lodge  Emmere: ekyenkya, ekyemisana, ekyeggulo  Ebanga: 160km

itineraryDays.title: Okulambula Queen Elizabeth
itineraryDays.description: Lambula savanna, ennyanja za crater n'amazzi agalimu enjovu, embogo, antelope n'ebinyonyi.
activities: Olugendo lw'eryato oba okutambula mu butonde
itineraryDays.details: Okusula: lodge  Emmere: ekyenkya, ekyemisana, ekyeggulo  Ebanga: 80km

itineraryDays.title: Okuddayo n'okujjukira obuwangwa
itineraryDays.description: Wummula n'ekyenkya nga tonnaddayo, nga waliwo obudde bw'okulaba emikono gy'awaka oba abantu b'omu kitundu.

items.text: Olugendo lwali lwa kitalo okuva ku ntandikwa okutuuka ku nkomerero. Abakulembeze baali bamanyi nnyo era baali ba mukwano.
Buli kimu kyategekebwa bulungi. Okulondoola engagi kwali kwa lumu mu bulamu.
Olugendo olusanyusa n'ebifo ebirungi n'ensolo ezitasangika.
Amaka gaffe gaawulira nga gafiibwako mu buli ddaala.
Safari yategekebwa bulungi n'abakulembeze ab'ekisa n'ebifo by'okusula ebirungi.
Okulondoola engagi kwali kwa maanyi mu mutima era tekujja kwerabirwa.
